description.en: Bayesian networks gave AI a compact language for uncertain reasoning. A directed graph encodes dependencies among variables, while conditional probability tables quantify how evidence should change beliefs. The idea became central to diagnosis, sensor fusion, decision support, and later causal modeling.
description.zh: 贝叶斯网络为 AI 提供了一种紧凑的不确定推理语言。有向图编码变量之间的依赖关系，条件概率表量化证据如何改变信念。这个思想成为诊断、传感器融合、决策支持和后来的因果建模的核心。

html.en: Symbolic AI struggled with uncertainty. Probabilistic graphical models connected knowledge representation with statistical inference.
html.zh: 符号 AI 难以处理不确定性。概率图模型把知识表示与统计推断连接起来。

html.en: A Bayesian network factorizes a joint distribution according to a directed acyclic graph, making inference modular.
html.zh: 贝叶斯网络按有向无环图分解联合分布，使推断模块化。

html.en: Experts generally treat Bayesian networks as a foundational language for uncertain reasoning. Their long-term legacy is the graphical connection between probability, evidence, and dependency structure, which later influenced causal reasoning and decision support.
html.zh: 专家通常把贝叶斯网络视为不确定推理的基础语言。它的长期影响在于用图结构连接概率、证据和依赖关系，并影响了后来的因果推理和决策支持。

method.en: Directed acyclic graph plus conditional probabilities
method.zh: 有向无环图加条件概率

material.en: UCLA technical reports and Pearl references
material.zh: 加州大学洛杉矶分校 技术报告与 Pearl 资料

demo.en: Pass probabilistic messages through a causal graph
demo.zh: 在因果图中传递概率消息

text.en: Nodes are variables and arrows express dependency structure.
text.zh: 节点是变量，箭头表达依赖结构。

text.en: Each node stores probabilities given its parents.
text.zh: 每个节点存储在父节点条件下的概率。

text.en: Evidence changes probabilities throughout the graph.
text.zh: 证据会改变图中各处概率。

site.zh: 加州大学洛杉矶分校计算机科学系

description.en: UCLA-hosted PDF on Bayesian networks by Judea Pearl.
description.zh: 加州大学洛杉矶分校 托管的 朱迪亚·珀尔 贝叶斯网络 PDF。

license.en: Reference link only; local visual is redrawn and does not reuse paper figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地视觉图为重绘，不复用论文图形。

usage.zh: 原始材料入口 / 文献参考

label.zh: 朱迪亚·珀尔, 加州大学洛杉矶分校 Samueli
